authorized_emails.title: Authorized Emails
authorized_emails.description: A list of email addresses permitted to access the application.

email.description: The email address of the authorized user.

user_profiles.title: User Profiles
user_profiles.description: User-specific data including trial status and role.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth ID of the user.
